subtasks.label: Unify theme tokens and remove undefined CSS variable usage

acceptance_criteria: Undefined raw RGB theme variables are removed from component class names or formally defined in the theme layer
Scholar cards and social links use the same Tailwind/CSS-variable theme system as the rest of the app

constraints: Do not change scholar data or page behavior
Do not edit unrelated components
After execution, move this task to review and update project-tracker.json immediately

subtasks.label: Verify ThemeProvider and full-page theme coverage
acceptance_criteria: ThemeProvider wraps every visible page surface that depends on dark mode

constraints: Do not introduce a second theme provider
Do not change translation behavior
